headline: US SINKS IRANIAN WARSHIP & NATO DESTROYS MISSILE HEADED FOR TURKEY
caption: A U.S. submarine sank an Iranian warship near Sri Lanka, killing at least 80 people, while NATO air defenses intercepted and destroyed an Iranian ballistic missile launched toward Turkey.

headline: TALARICO WINS DEM NOMINATION
caption: Texas state Rep. James Talarico has won the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in Texas. He will face the Republican nominee in November in a race that could become one of the most closely watched Senate contests of 2026.
